chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Constitution Petition No.D-536 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on o/objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 03.09.2025 Mr. Aftab Ahmed Malano, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Naveeed Ahmed Shah, DAG along with Manzoor Ali, Assistant Pakistan Railway..-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- The respondents in the para No.10 of their preliminary objections have admitted the liability and stated that same has not been released on the ground that the Pakistan Railways is facing financial constraints. In the circumstances, as the claim is admitted, the respondents are directed to release the amount of petitioner within thirty days. The petition is hereby disposed of accordingly. JUDGE JUDGE S.Nawaz(St)’
